description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Buffalo, New York, founded around 1910 by Angelo Palmeri. It operates throughout Western New York, Erie, Pennsylvania, and Hamilton, Ontario, Canada. The family was led for decades by Stefano Magaddino, a member of The Commission, and is currently headed by Joseph A. Todaro Jr. It is involved in racketeering, gambling, loansharking, drug trafficking, and other illegal activities.

country_links.evidence_quote: Canadian faction ... Giacomo Luppino – former capo of the 'Luppino crew' in Hamilton. ... Enio Mora ... immigrated to Canada ... Paul Volpe – former made member of the Buffalo family who was sponsored by Giacomo Luppino, Jimmy and Harold Bordonaro in Hamilton.
country_links.context: The Buffalo crime family operates in Canada through its Canadian faction, with members and crews based in Hamilton, Niagara Falls, and Toronto.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nicoletti along with Thomas set up a betting service based in the Dominican Republic
country_links.context: A Buffalo family member set up a betting service based in the Dominican Republic.

country_links.evidence_quote: international drug-trafficking between Buffalo and Sicily ... linked the Sicilian Mafia families (Spatola, Gambino and Inzerillo) and the American Mafia families in Buffalo...
country_links.context: The Buffalo family was linked to international drug-trafficking between Buffalo and Sicily, involving Sicilian Mafia families.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Buffalo crime family ... is an Italian American Mafia crime family based in Buffalo , New York . Criminal investigators assert that the family operates throughout Western New York , Erie, Pennsylvania ...
country_links.context: The family is based in Buffalo, New York, and operates in Erie, Pennsylvania, and Las Vegas, Nevada, including a cocaine pipeline from Las Vegas to Buffalo.
